trigger.description: A rejected curation candidate reached its harmful-feedback escalation TTL.
setup_commands: ee remember --workspace . --level semantic --kind fact 'J6 curation harmful target memory.' --json

ee diag curation-candidate --workspace . --candidate-id curate_j6000000000000000000000001 --candidate-type deprecate --status rejected --target-memory-id <memory-id> --source-type feedback_event --source-id j6-harmful --reason 'J6 harmful candidate escalation fixture' --confidence 0.8 --created-at 2026-05-01T00:00:00Z --review-state rejected --state-entered-at 2000-01-01T00:00:00Z --ttl-policy-id curation.harmful.default --json

expected_emission.repair_string: Run `ee curate disposition --json` and review escalated candidates.
